Whatszara Docs

Everything you need to know about Whatszara — from setup to architecture to every component. No Python required. Built with Rust + Go.

Getting Started

Set up Whatszara in under a minute — no Python required.

Read

Architecture

Two-component architecture: Go WhatsApp bridge + Tauri desktop app.

Read

Components

Every Rust module explained: policy, actions, LLM, orchestrator, undo.

Read

Features

Complete feature overview: multi-LLM, per-tool permissions, allowlist, contact modes.

Read

Policy & Permissions

Propose → Evaluate → Execute: structured actions, risk profiles, allowlist.

Read

Frontend UI

Tauri dashboard: provider config, policy editor, action log.

Read

Releases & Downloads

Download for macOS, Windows, Linux. Release notes and changelog.
